examples: Resupply, not terrain, limits military operations.
And second, there's only so much room aboard the resupply missions.
You can resupply every two years, when Earth and Mars are at their nearest proximity.
Shipments of humanitarian aid and resupply going into Iraq have kept the cargo business robust.
In Afghanistan and Iraq, fuel and water comprise about 70 to 80 percent of ground resupply weight.
